mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM team WHERE leader_id = #{leaderId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM team WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team (name, team_type, description, leader_id, leader_name, leader_student_id, college_name, member_count, recruiting, is_public, recruitment_requirement, honors, tags, instructor_name, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{teamType}, #{description}, #{leaderId}, #{leaderName}, #{leaderStudentId}, #{collegeName}, #{memberCount}, #{recruiting}, #{isPublic}, #{recruitmentRequirement}, #{honors}, #{tags}, #{instructorName}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE team SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
